dsl_rule.translation_notes: Doji pattern detected via small body_pct (< 5%). Gap up condition: open > previous high. Black candle preference captured by close < open. Direction marked LONG (bullish breakout expectation from table references). Success rates (43% bull, 42% bear) inform modest 2% stop loss. Exit on reversal (close crossing below open) as author silent on explicit exit. Volume consideration noted but not quantifiable without specific thresholds.

source_rule_text: Doji, Gapping Up: A candlestick pattern where a doji forms with a gap up from the previous candle
